channel.title: Network Security Perimeter on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Network Security Perimeter on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Network Security Perimeter support for Azure Event Hubs
item.description:
Azure Event Hubs now generally supports Network Security Perimeter (NSP). This lets organizations define a logical network isolation boundary for PaaS resources and control public network access using perimeter-based access rules.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Private Connectivity for Azure AI Search and Foundry Knowledge Bases
item.description:
Azure AI Search and Foundry Knowledge Bases now support private end-to-end network connectivity between search resources and Foundry services. Traffic for ingestion, enrichment, retrieval, and agent operations can be routed over Shared Private Link or Network Security Perimeter.

  • Source: Azure Updates
